tagline: The Clear Choice for Pool Services

hero.headline:
Central Florida's Trusted Pool Care
Family
hero.subheadline: For nearly 20 years, the Bushaw family has kept Central Florida pools sparkling clean. From weekly maintenance to full builds, we handle every detail so you can simply enjoy the water.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Full-Service Pool Care From<br class="hidden md:block"> One Trusted Family
services.subtitle: Whether you need weekly cleaning, a major repair, or a complete pool build, Southeast Pools handles it all. One team, one call, total peace of mind.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Maintenance
cards.description: Thorough cleaning, chemical balancing, and equipment checks every week. Your pool stays crystal clear and swim-ready without you lifting a finger.

cards.title: Pool & Equipment Repair
cards.description: Pumps, filters, heaters, motors, and plumbing — our certified techs diagnose and fix problems fast so your pool runs at peak performance.

cards.title: Pool Resurfacing & Remodeling
cards.description: Breathe new life into an aging pool with professional resurfacing, retiling, and remodeling that transforms your backyard into a private retreat.

cards.title: Commercial Pool Service
cards.description: HOAs, resorts, and community pools trust us for reliable commercial maintenance, repairs, and compliance-ready water management.

cards.title: Pool Heater Service
cards.description: Expert heating system diagnostics, repair, and replacement to keep your pool at the perfect temperature through every Florida season.

cards.title: New Pool Construction
cards.description: Custom-designed residential pools built from concept to completion. The Bushaw family oversees every step for a turnkey backyard experience.

steps.title: Schedule Your Free Assessment
steps.description: Call or fill out the form. We'll visit your property, inspect your pool, and provide an honest, no-obligation quote — usually within 24 hours.

steps.title: We Take Care of Everything
steps.description: Our state-licensed technicians arrive on schedule, handle all cleaning, chemistry, and equipment needs, and send you photos after every visit.

steps.title: Relax and Enjoy Your Pool
steps.description: Your pool stays sparkling, safe, and swim-ready all year long. If anything ever falls short, we come back and make it right — that's the Southeast Pools promise.

about.label: Why Central Florida Trusts Us
about.headline: A Family Business Built on Doing Things Right
about.description: Since 2006, the Bushaw family has built Southeast Pools into one of Central Florida's most trusted pool companies. With a state-certified CPC license and a BuildZoom score in the top 20% of Florida contractors, we bring real credentials — not just promises. Every pool we maintain, repair, or build gets the same care we'd give our own.

features.title: State-Certified Contractor
features.description: Holding active CPC license #1459162 from the Florida DBPR — ranked in the top 20% of all licensed contractors statewide.

features.title: Nearly 20 Years of Experience
features.description: Since 2006, we've served thousands of residential and commercial clients across Clermont, Orlando, and greater Central Florida.

features.title: Photo Documentation Every Visit
features.description: After every service, we send detailed photos so you always know exactly what was done and the condition of your pool.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Choose the service level that fits your pool. Flexible plans, honest pricing, and real value from a licensed contractor.

guarantee.headline: Our "Crystal Clear" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're ever unsatisfied with a service visit, call us and we'll return to make it right at no additional charge. We've been earning trust in Central Florida since 2006, and we stand behind every single visit with a family's word — not just a policy.

faqs.question: How soon can you start servicing my pool?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are on our schedule within 3-5 business days. For urgent issues like green pools or equipment failures, we offer priority response. Call us at (407) 507-2570 and we'll get you set up fast.

faqs.question: Are you licensed and insured?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Southeast Pools holds an active Certified Pool/Spa Contractor license (CPC1459162) from the Florida DBPR. We carry full liability insurance and our BuildZoom score of 96 places us in the top 20% of all licensed contractors in Florida.

faqs.question: Do you service commercial pools and HOAs?
faqs.answer: Yes. We maintain pools for HOAs, property management groups, community amenities, and resort properties throughout Central Florida. Commercial clients receive dedicated scheduling, compliance-ready documentation, and priority support.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Clermont, Champions Gate, Davenport, Orlando, Kissimmee, Winter Garden, Windermere, Dr. Phillips, and surrounding Central Florida communities. If you're nearby, there's a good chance we cover your area.

faqs.question: Can you handle both repairs and weekly maintenance?
faqs.answer: That's what makes us different. Southeast Pools is a full-service operation — from weekly cleaning and chemical balancing to major equipment repairs, resurfacing, and even new pool construction. One trusted team handles everything.

testimonials.name: Terry B.
testimonials.text: I have used Southeast Pools for my weekly pool service and repairs for 20+ years. They are reliable and trustworthy. They refurbished our pool and are an excellent full service pool company.

testimonials.name: Wendy W.
testimonials.text: Southeast Pools is awesome! They built my pool and they service my pool weekly. They are dependable. My pool is always sparkling clean and ready to swim.

testimonials.name: Joan F.
testimonials.text: From design to completion, the Southeast Pools team members were professional, friendly, courteous and on time. Comprehensive turnkey project management.

contact.subtitle: Get a free, no-obligation pool assessment from a licensed Central Florida contractor. Nearly 20 years of family-owned expertise, one phone call away.
